data.title: TETRAPHARM reports promising preclinical data for TPC-026, a novel chronic therapy for metabolic disorders, including obesity.
data.description: In Copenhagen, Denmark on January 28, 2026, TETRAPHARM, a biopharmaceutical firm based in the city, specializing in neuroscience, psychiatry, and metabolic disorders, revealed positive preclinical results for TPC-026. This new experimental compound is showing potential and is currently in development for various purposes.
VOLVO 4Q ADJ. OPER PROFIT SEK12.77B, EST. SEK11.4B

data.title: Chainalysis reports $82 billion was laundered on-chain in 2025, as crypto launderers shift focus from centralized exchanges to Chinese networks.
data.description: In 2025, an estimated $82 billion in funds were processed through the on-chain money laundering ecosystem, according to Chainalysis. Chinese-language networks have emerged as the dominant players in this illicit financial activity.

data.title: UK prohibits Coinbase ads deemed to ‘trivialize’ crypto risks. Musical ad, banned from TV, now faces wider ban for being ‘irresponsible.'
data.description: A musical ad created by Coinbase showing a deteriorating UK has been banned by the country's ad watchdog for being "irresponsible." The ad, initially banned from TV, has now received a widespread ban. This decision comes after the ad faced scrutiny for its portrayal of a run-down UK.

data.title: Trump criticizes Fed Chair for high interest rates, promises rates to come down 'a lot' under new chair. Announcement soon.
data.description: President Donald Trump criticized the Federal Reserve and Chair Jerome Powell for maintaining high interest rates, expressing his belief that rates will decrease significantly under the next Chair. During a speech in Iowa, Trump denounced Powell for a lack of promptness and decisiveness in implementing monetary policies, describing him as "too late." Trump accused Powell of purposely keeping borrowing costs high, indicating that his administration managed to lower rates despite this. As Powell plans to resign as Fed chair in May, Trump stated that a "great Fed chairman" will be appointed soon. Trump's remarks were made during a speech in Iowa.
STANDARD CHARTERED ON "USD SOFTNESS AND SHARP MOVES HIGHER IN AND HAVE SUPPORTED COPPER PRICES"
Kazakhstan aims to restore Tengiz oil output to usual levels within seven days, minister says.

data.title: MLBB expanding globally with new tournaments; M8 World Championship held in Türkiye and Thailand. MLBB to feature in Esports Nation Cup 2026 and Asian Games Aichi-Nagoya 2026. New Championship Tour to include AMER, EA, and SEA.
data.description: The debut of MLBB in the Esports Nation Cup (ENC) 2026 marks a significant milestone as it becomes the first confirmed title for the event. This popular mobile game will make its official appearance as a medalled event at the 20th Asian Games Aichi-Nagoya 2026. MLBB Esports has also introduced an innovative intercontinental tournament called the Championship Tour, which will span across AMER, EA, and SEA regions. This move aims to enhance the competitive gaming experience and attract more participants, further solidifying MLBB's presence in the esports scene.

data.title: NTT Group to jointly exhibit at MWC Barcelona 2026, showcasing tech capabilities; event from March 2-5, fostering global connections.
data.description: In Tokyo, the NTT Group, including NTT, Inc., NTT DOCOMO, INC., and NTT DATA Group Corporation, disclosed plans to collectively participate in MWC Barcelona 2026. The event, taking place in Barcelona, Spain, from March 2 to March 5, 2026, is renowned as the world's largest connectivity event. The NTT Group aims to exhibit its tech prowess and enhance relationships with prominent global firms during this exhibition. This move aligns with their refreshed corporate identity (CI) as they seek to consolidate their presence on a global scale.

data.title: ASML's financials for 2025: €32.7B total net sales, €9.6B net income. Predicts €34-39B total net sales in 2026.
data.description: In its latest financial report, ASML announced total net sales of €32.7 billion and a net income of €9.6 billion for the year 2025. Looking ahead to 2026, the company projects total net sales to fall within a range of €34 billion to €39 billion. ASML also anticipates a gross margin for the upcoming year to be between 51% and 53%.
